channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: Maternal exposure to environmental stressors is associated with decreased odds of infant survival among preterm infants

item.title: Japan approves stem-cell treatment for Parkinson's in world first

item.title: Work Disability Risk Can Persist Years After TBI
item.description: Traumatic brain injury is linked to a persistently increased risk for work disability irrespective of the severity of the trauma, a new cohort study s...

item.title: Anti-obesity treatment could cost as little as $3 per month: Study

item.title: FDA Extends Approval of PKU Drug to Include Adolescents
item.description: Previously only approved for adults, BioMarinâs pegvaliase-pqpz (PALYNZIQ) is now licensed for patients as young as 12 years. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Children With OSA Have Greater Risk for Flu and COVID
item.description: Surprisingly, adenotonsillectomy for obstructive sleep apnea did not reduce the risk. Medscape Medical News
